info.title: Lemon Squeezy API
info.description: The Lemon Squeezy API is a REST API using JSON:API encoding for managing digital commerce including stores, products, customers, orders, subscriptions, discounts, license keys, checkouts, and webhooks. Rate limited to 300 API calls per minute.

post.summary: Generate an invoice for an order
Issue a refund for an order

get.summary: Retrieve current usage for a subscription item

bearerAuth.description: API key obtained from Lemon Squeezy dashboard. Pass as Bearer token.
